data.name: Title
data.value: Collections - Luxury Choice and Design Precision

data.name: HeroDesc
data.value: Discover worlds of design where architectural precision meets quiet luxury. Each collection is a story told through wood, fabric, and light.

data.name: QualityPromiseTitle
data.value: Ruqi Promise: Quality Inherited by Generations

data.name: QualityPromiseDesc
data.value: At Ruqi, we don't just design furniture; we create lasting investments. Every piece undergoes rigorous quality testing, from raw material selection to manual finishing touches.

data.name: ExceptionalMaterialsDesc
data.value: We use the best types of natural wood, Italian leathers, and carefully selected fabrics.

data.name: HandmadeDesc
data.value: We combine traditional woodworking techniques with the latest architectural precision tools.

data.name: MonolithDesc
data.value: Designs inspired by Brutalist architecture, featuring bold lines and solid masses providing a perfect balance between strength and comfort. Ideal for large modern spaces.

data.name: HavenDesc
data.value: Centered around the concept of serenity and purity. Calm earthy colors and luxurious natural fabrics designed to transform bedrooms into true oases of relaxation and tranquility.

data.name: EssentialsDesc
data.value: A collection focused on function without compromising on beauty. Dining room pieces combining natural wood and polished metals to create unforgettable social spaces.

data.name: LegacyDesc
data.value: Reviving classic designs with a modern touch. Office furniture pieces that suggest dignity and support productivity while maintaining the spirit of quiet luxury.
